text.title: VUI Testing Best Practices Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from observable signals to a rule-grounded conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: Is this a deterministic assertion or a qualitative judgement?

conclusion.verdict: tier-1: assertion runner with intent/slot/dialog-state checks
tier-2: LLM-judge blind to expected answer

example.trace: intent recognition fixture → deterministic-answer-known → tier-1 assertion runner

text.example: Trace through the tree producing the leaf conclusion.
